title: LightLevelDisplay
description: Toggle light level visibility for safer exploration.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

LightLevelDisplay is a practical and user-friendly plugin that helps players monitor the light level of the block they are standing on, directly indicating whether monsters can spawn there. By using the /lightlevel command, players can easily toggle the feature on or off, making it a valuable tool for survival, base building, or ensuring mob-free zones.

The plugin supports both chat and action bar messages, configurable via the settings, with a future upgrade planned for bossbar support. Messages are fully customizable and support both Bukkit color codes (&) and hex color codes (&#rrggbb), allowing for personalized styling.

Key features include:

Configurable permissions (lightdisplay) to control who can use the command.

Language support with multiple pre-included translations (en, cs, de, es, fr, sk, pl, ru, it, el, uk, et).

Real-time light level feedback when moving between blocks.

Clear messages indicating if monsters can or cannot spawn based on the current light level.

Update checker and metrics integration to keep everything up-to-date and optimized.

With its flexibility, multilingual support, and player-friendly design, LightLevelDisplay is a must-have utility plugin for any survival or community-focused Minecraft server.
